title: GetResponse vs Benchmark Email (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: GetResponse vs Benchmark Email: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: GetResponse vs Benchmark Email: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between GetResponse and Benchmark Email comes down to your specific use case. GetResponse is built for online course creators and webinar hosts, while Benchmark Email targets small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform.

comparison_table.tool_a: Online Course Creators And Webinar Hosts
comparison_table.tool_b: Small Businesses Wanting An Easy-To-Use Email Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on online course creators and webinar hosts
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform

faq.q: Is GetResponse better than Benchmark Email?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. GetResponse wins for online course creators and webinar hosts, while Benchmark Email is stronger for small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Benchmark Email?
faq.a: Benchmark Email starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Benchmark Email to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
